lines.speaker: Adjuster
lines.text: This is Daniel Price with North Harbor Mutual. Today is May sixteenth, twenty twenty-six. This is a recorded statement for claim A U T O B I seven eight four two. I am speaking with Maria Santos. Maria, do I have your permission to record this statement?

lines.speaker: Claimant
lines.text: Yes, that is fine.

lines.speaker: Adjuster
lines.text: Please confirm your full name and mailing city for the record.

lines.speaker: Claimant
lines.text: My name is Maria Santos. My mailing city is Tampa, Florida.

lines.speaker: Adjuster
lines.text: We are discussing the motor vehicle accident from May fourteenth, twenty twenty-six. Were you driving the gray twenty twenty-one Toyota Corolla?

lines.speaker: Claimant
lines.text: Yes, I was driving the Corolla.

lines.speaker: Adjuster
lines.text: Where were you coming from and where were you headed?

lines.speaker: Claimant
lines.text: I left my apartment and was going to pick up office supplies before going to work.

lines.speaker: Adjuster
lines.text: Were those supplies for your employer?

lines.speaker: Claimant
lines.text: Yes. My manager asked me to pick up printer toner and receipt paper.

lines.speaker: Adjuster
lines.text: Was that something you were doing as part of your job duties?

lines.speaker: Claimant
lines.text: I guess yes. I was doing it because my manager asked.

lines.speaker: Adjuster
lines.text: Tell me what happened just before the impact.

lines.speaker: Claimant
lines.text: I was in the middle lane on Fletcher Avenue. Traffic was moving, not stopped. The white S U V came up on my right and hit me.

lines.speaker: Adjuster
lines.text: Were you changing lanes at the time?

lines.speaker: Claimant
lines.text: No, I was not changing lanes. I was in my lane.

lines.speaker: Adjuster
lines.text: Had you started to move toward the right lane?

lines.speaker: Claimant
lines.text: I mean, I had checked my mirror and I was thinking about moving right, but I was still mostly in the middle lane.

lines.speaker: Adjuster
lines.text: Did you activate your turn signal?

lines.speaker: Claimant
lines.text: I believe I did. I always use my signal.

lines.speaker: Adjuster
lines.text: Are you certain the signal was on?

lines.speaker: Claimant
lines.text: I cannot say one hundred percent. It happened fast, but I usually signal.

lines.speaker: Adjuster
lines.text: Were you looking straight ahead when you checked the lane?

lines.speaker: Claimant
lines.text: Mostly, yes. My phone buzzed in the cup holder, and I glanced down for maybe a second, but I was not texting.

lines.speaker: Adjuster
lines.text: About how fast were you traveling?

lines.speaker: Claimant
lines.text: Around thirty-five miles per hour.

lines.speaker: Adjuster
lines.text: Is that an estimate?

lines.speaker: Claimant
lines.text: Yes. It might have been forty, maybe closer to forty-five. I do not remember exactly.

lines.speaker: Adjuster
lines.text: What part of your vehicle was struck?

lines.speaker: Claimant
lines.text: The front passenger door and the right front fender.

lines.speaker: Adjuster
lines.text: Was your vehicle drivable after the accident?

lines.speaker: Claimant
lines.text: Yes, I drove it home. The passenger door made a scraping sound, but it still opened.

lines.speaker: Adjuster
lines.text: Did airbags deploy?

lines.speaker: Claimant
lines.text: No, no airbags deployed.

lines.speaker: Adjuster
lines.text: Did police come to the scene?

lines.speaker: Claimant
lines.text: No. We moved into a gas station parking lot and exchanged information.

lines.speaker: Adjuster
lines.text: Were there any witnesses?

lines.speaker: Claimant
lines.text: There was a man at the gas station who said he saw it, but I did not get his full name. I think his first name was Kevin.

lines.speaker: Adjuster
lines.text: Did you get Kevin's phone number?

lines.speaker: Claimant
lines.text: No, I forgot to ask before he left.

lines.speaker: Adjuster
lines.text: Did you take photos at the scene?

lines.speaker: Claimant
lines.text: Yes, I took photos of the cars in the parking lot and then more photos when I got home.

lines.speaker: Adjuster
lines.text: Did you feel injured at the scene?

lines.speaker: Claimant
lines.text: At the scene I was shaken up, but I told the other driver I was okay.

lines.speaker: Adjuster
lines.text: When did you first feel pain?

lines.speaker: Claimant
lines.text: My neck felt tight later that evening. My lower back started hurting two days later.

lines.speaker: Adjuster
lines.text: Earlier in your claim report, you said you felt back pain right away. Do you remember saying that?

lines.speaker: Claimant
lines.text: I might have said I felt pain after the accident. I do not remember saying it was right away.

lines.speaker: Adjuster
lines.text: Did you seek treatment on May fourteenth?

lines.speaker: Claimant
lines.text: No. I went to urgent care on May eighteenth because the back pain was not going away.

lines.speaker: Adjuster
lines.text: Did you receive any treatment before urgent care?

lines.speaker: Claimant
lines.text: Just ice, ibuprofen, and rest.

lines.speaker: Adjuster
lines.text: Have you ever had lower back problems before this accident?

lines.speaker: Claimant
lines.text: I had a lower back strain about three years ago from moving furniture, but it got better after physical therapy.

lines.speaker: Adjuster
lines.text: Any treatment for your back in the last year before this accident?

lines.speaker: Claimant
lines.text: No treatment in the last year.

lines.speaker: Adjuster
lines.text: Did urgent care refer you anywhere?

lines.speaker: Claimant
lines.text: They told me to follow up with my primary doctor and maybe physical therapy if it did not improve.

lines.speaker: Adjuster
lines.text: Did you miss work?

lines.speaker: Claimant
lines.text: I missed one full day and worked from home for two days.

lines.speaker: Adjuster
lines.text: Do you have a repair estimate?

lines.speaker: Claimant
lines.text: Not yet. The body shop said they could inspect it next week.

lines.speaker: Adjuster
lines.text: Is there anything else we should know?

lines.speaker: Claimant
lines.text: I still think the S U V was speeding, but I cannot say exactly how fast. I was trying to get over and then everything happened quickly.

lines.speaker: Adjuster
lines.text: Thank you. This concludes the recorded statement at three forty-two P M on May sixteenth, twenty twenty-six.
